title: release v1.3: mention openSUSE
body:
Buildah v1.3 is already in openSUSE Tumbleweed, so let's put it on the
list of Buildah-shipping distributions.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <vrothberg@suse.com>

comments.body:
@TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

I am quite proud of the speed we ship updates to openSUSE, so I'd love to have it among the recognized distros :)

:pushpin: Commit a570258 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan a570258ae857f6cd51fdfa11f3ba817eb322f7c7 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
@vrothberg Absolutely and when we meet I owe you a beer for neglecting to update my template (shame face is fully on).  Thanks for the catch and update.
